data.name: Light Fall: A Clicker RPG
data.detailed_description:
- TAKE BREAKS BETWEEN BATTLES TO PREVENT ANY INJURY! -

Enter the world of Xylon, joining Heather and Nutmeg as they journey to stop ancient evil entities from turning their world into a desolate lust filled wasteland!

  • Customize your character with a name and image from your PC

  • Journey through an engaging 2+ Hour Story Campaign

  • Level up to gain Skills for your party to mix up combat

  • Unlock Character and Enemy Artwork in the Gallery

  • 20+ Enemies to take on (and undress) one handed

  • Sexy Hand Drawn High Resolution 2D Artwork

  • Hot Original Music Soundtrack

  • New Game+ Mode
data.about_the_game:
- TAKE BREAKS BETWEEN BATTLES TO PREVENT ANY INJURY! -

Enter the world of Xylon, joining Heather and Nutmeg as they journey to stop ancient evil entities from turning their world into a desolate lust filled wasteland!

  • Customize your character with a name and image from your PC

  • Journey through an engaging 2+ Hour Story Campaign

  • Level up to gain Skills for your party to mix up combat

  • Unlock Character and Enemy Artwork in the Gallery

  • 20+ Enemies to take on (and undress) one handed

  • Sexy Hand Drawn High Resolution 2D Artwork

  • Hot Original Music Soundtrack

  • New Game+ Mode
data.short_description: Customize your character and set off on a journey across the world of Xylon! Imps, Slimes, and Goblins are just few of the creatures you'll face (and undress) as you uncover a looming dark threat that when awakened will rip the entire world a new one!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Onboard
